description: Control a Fellow Stagg EKG kettle over its local HTTP command interface from the terminal.

novel_features.name: Status snapshot
novel_features.description: One-shot state, settings, and firmware view for a quick kettle check.

novel_features.name: Heat with target temperature
novel_features.description: Set the kettle target temperature and then start heating in one invocation.

novel_features.name: Direct hardware controls
novel_features.description: Press or release the kettle buttons and rotate the dial without opening the app.

novel_features.name: Raw recovery path
novel_features.description: Send an arbitrary local HTTP command string when you need a recovery or debugging escape hatch.
